mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.coupon_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, coupon_id, code, name, description, discount_type, discount_value, min_order_value, max_discount_amount, start_date, end_date, usage_limit, usage_count, usage_per_customer, state_id, flow_id, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT p.id, p.tenant, NOW(), p.id, p.code, p.name, p.description, p.discount_type, p.discount_value, p.min_order_value, p.max_discount_amount, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.usage_limit, p.usage_count, p.usage_per_customer, p.state_id, p.flow_id, p.created_time, p.last_modified_time FROM hm_promo.coupon p

INSERT INTO hm_query.campaign_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, campaign_id, name, campaign_type, description, discount_type, discount_value, start_date, end_date, budget, spent, revenue, usage_count, min_order_amount, max_discount_amount, remaining_budget, roi, state_id, flow_id, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT c.id, c.tenant, NOW(), c.id, c.name, c.campaign_type, c.description, c.discount_type, c.discount_value, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.budget, c.spent, c.revenue, c.usage_count, c.min_order_amount, c.max_discount_amount, (c.budget - c.spent), CASE WHEN c.spent > 0 THEN (c.revenue / c.spent) ELSE 0 END, c.state_id, c.flow_id, c.created_time, c.last_modified_time FROM hm_promo.campaign c
